character_buff.name: Soul of Wind
character_buff.description: Unifies with the wind to show agile, strong but smooth movement.

skills.name: Intensify
skills.description: Increases ATK of all team members.

skills.name: Fortify
skills.description: Increases Max HP of all team members. Not applied with [Acceleration] simultaneously.

skills.name: Acceleration
skills.description: Increases Attack/Move SPD of all team members. Not applied with [Fortify] simultaneously.

skills.name: Meditation
skills.description: Increases HP/SP Regen. of all team members.

skills.name: Consolidation
skills.description: Increases penetration rate.

skills.name: Prompt Action
skills.description: Skill casting time of your family decreases.

skills.name: Divine Bless
skills.description: Increases HP and SP regeneration of your family. Regeneration increases with level.

skills.name: Refresh Mind
skills.description: Clear mind of target to remove abnormal status, and reset all cooldowns for current stance.

skills.name: Cortar en Recta
skills.description: Impale enemies on your blade and rend him apart. Reduces defence of enemies.

skills.name: Dagger Venenosa
skills.description: Applies venom on a dagger. Each subsequent attack can inflict Poisoning on enemy.

skills.name: Baile Soleares
skills.description: A series of powerful slashes.

skills.name: Ventaja Ligera
skills.description: Allows you to break through enemy lines with powerful slashes.
skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 8m away and within 3m width

skills.name: Sierra Ilimitada
skills.description: Strikes suddenly to catch enemies unawares.

stances.name: Arnis

skills.name: Lado Patada
skills.description: Stabs the enemy lethally and kicks it into the air.

skills.name: Asesinato
skills.description: Throw a dagger at a fallen enemy.

skills.name: Intoxicacion
skills.description: Applies venom on a dagger. Each subsequent attack can inflict Paralysis on enemy.

skills.name: Asalto
skills.description: Attacks and paralyzes enemies.
skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 5m away and within a 1m radius

skills.name: Rapida Ataque
skills.description: Attacks the weak point of enemy.

lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 11% of extra [STR]
[PVP/PVE Maps] Additional 4% DMG according to extra [STR]
Ignore additional DEF according to extra [STR] * 4
Additional DMG against [PC] + 1x
Additional DMG against Monster according to 4 * 50

skills.name: Principal
skills.description: Provide basic buffs to team. The power can be doubled according to the circumstances.

skills.name: Melee Enhance
skills.description: Gives the buff that makes Melee Stance attack much stronger.

skills.name: Magic Enhance
skills.description: Gives the buff that makes Magic Stance attack much stronger.

skills.name: Shooting Enhance
skills.description: Gives the buff that makes Shoot Stance attack much stronger.

skills.name: Escape Artist
skills.description: Cancel darkness type curse on squad members as well as detect invisibility. Increase resistance of darkness type curse for a given time.

stances.name: Ancient Tactics

skills.name: Miracle
skills.description: Execute a tactic that increases the offensive and defensive capacity of the ally.

skills.name: Protecting Booster
skills.description: Increase the defensive capacity of target ally.

skills.name: Shearing Booster
skills.description: Increase the offensive capacity of target ally.

skills.name: Bartor
skills.description: Remove all harmful effects and restore HP of all team members.

skills.name: Additional Training
skills.description: Increase skill level by enhancing own tactical capacity.

levels.value: Increase all skills level by enhancing your own tactical capacity.
Increase all skills level by enhancing your own tactical capacity.

lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 2% of extra [None]

skills.name: Encourage
skills.description: Dramatically enhances the offensive abilities of team members. Cannot be stacked with certain buffs.

skills.name: Pulsate
skills.description: Increases the speed of the designated ally.

skills.name: Meditate
skills.description: Enhances the ATK of the designated ally according to their combat attributes.

skills.name: Netherworld
skills.description: Maximizes the offensive capabilities of the selected character by leveraging their strengths.

skills.name: Additional Assist
skills.description: Installs a tactical trap. Upon casting, reduces the cooldown of all of your characters except [Additional Assist].

stances.name: Martial Arts Book-Chap. of Earth

skills.name: Blazing Uppercut
skills.description: A powerful punch as quick as an ascending hawk.

skills.name: Lionheart
skills.description: Terrifies enemies with the roars of a lion.
skills.target: Up to 5 enemies within a range of 4m

skills.name: Atomic Phoenix Bomber
skills.description: Shatters the soul of enemies.

stances.name: Martial Arts Compendium

skills.name: Enhanced Elemental Kick

skills.name: Enhanced Lion Heart
skills.description: Push the physical and mental limits.

skills.name: Elemental Kick
skills.description: Jump to the sky and rapidly fall to ground to give a big shock to enemy around you.

skills.name: Elemental Punch
skills.description: Rapidly pummels an enemy 7 times with fists.

skills.name: Elemental Power
skills.description: Transform into an avatar of the god of elemental power.

skills.name: Swift Dash
skills.description: Hit the enemy to the air, and smash it on the floor.

skills.name: Dragon Aura
skills.description: Emits the aura of the dragon and nullifies nearby enemies.
skills.target: Up to 8 targets within a 10m surrounding radius

skills.name: Titan Break
skills.description: Defeat the enemy with a powerful series of attacks that will defeat even the giant.

skills.name: Ultimate Soul
skills.description: Connect the ultimate specialty of the Five Books of Martial Arts.

skills.name: Additional Rage
skills.description: Muster the strength by borrowing strength from the gods.
